\tzpentry{ID3556}{Wavefunction Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3556 introduces Wavefunction Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \psi_1(r,\theta)= r^{\ell_\varphi} e^{i\ell_\varphi\theta} e^{-r^2/(2\sigma^2)}, \quad \psi_2(r,\theta)= e^{-r^2/(2\sigma^2)}. \]
